identity.name: AURIONA OS
identity.description: A premium, glassmorphism-heavy launcher interface inspired by sci-fi control systems. Deep void blacks, neon cyan accents, and smooth physics-based interactions.

scale.h3: text-xl md:text-2xl font-medium tracking-widest text-cyan-400 uppercase
scale.caption: text-xs md:text-sm font-medium tracking-[0.2em] text-muted-foreground uppercase

spacing_layout.launcher_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 h-[100dvh] overflow-hidden

GlassPanel.description: The fundamental building block. A translucent card with a subtle border and blur.
GlassPanel.classes: relative bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl

variants.interactive: hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-cyan-500/50 transition-all duration-300 group cursor-pointer

NeonButton.description: High-emphasis action buttons with glow effects.
NeonButton.classes: relative px-8 py-3 bg-cyan-500/10 border border-cyan-500/50 text-cyan-400 font-bold tracking-widest uppercase hover:bg-cyan-500 hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.1)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,240,255,0.6)] rounded-xl

HoloMenuItem.description: Vertical navigation items for the launcher menu.
HoloMenuItem.classes: flex items-center gap-4 p-4 w-full text-left text-lg font-medium text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 border-l-2 border-transparent hover:border-cyan-500 transition-all duration-200 group rounded-r-xl

CommandBar.description: Floating AI input at the bottom.
CommandBar.classes: fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] md:w-[600px] h-14 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-3xl border border-white/20 rounded-full flex items-center px-4 shadow-2xl z-50 ring-1 ring-white/10 focus-within:ring-cyan-500/50 transition-all

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: `npm install framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge lucide-react` (if not present).
FONT SETUP: Add the Google Fonts link to `public/index.html` head.
THEME: Force Dark Mode in Tailwind config. Set `darkMode: 'class'`.
LAYOUT: Use a CSS Grid layout. Top row = Header (Status). Middle row = Content (Apps/Menu). Bottom row = Command Bar.
GLASSMORPHISM: Ensure all panels have `backdrop-filter: blur(...)`. If using Chrome, ensure hardware acceleration is supported by simple transforms.
INTERACTION: Add hover states to EVERYTHING. The UI must feel 'alive'.
DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items).
RESPONSIVE: On mobile, the Menu should be a drawer or full-screen list. On desktop, it can be a sidebar.
NO SCROLLBARS: Hide scrollbars with `scrollbar-width: none;` or `[&::-webkit-scrollbar]:hidden` for a cleaner look.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures/noise overlays are encouraged.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
